reasoning: To improve lactate clearance and enhance aerobic base, we're focusing on over-unders that mirror the demands of the Alpine Loop's key segment. Your last ride indicated lower intensity, so today we'll systematically work just below and above threshold to build fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12 min over-unders: 2 min at 242-256W, 3 min at 201-218W, repeat

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
